name: NoMorePwn — Verified Login Capture
description: Captures credentials only after a login is verified to have succeeded.
//key: Pins the extension ID to cjgphedkabfdfbhkfleagmanmmhlolkl on every machine.
Without this, an unpacked extension's ID is derived from its install path,
so it differs per user — and the native-messaging host manifest has to name
that exact ID in allowed_origins. Pinning is what lets the desktop app
register the bridge without asking you to copy an ID by hand.
This is the PUBLIC key; the private half is only needed to pack a .crx.
